jobs.ai_h1: NBE Recruitment 2026: 53 Posts for Group A, B, C Vacancies
jobs.ai_title: NBE Recruitment 2026: Apply for 53 Group A, B, C Posts by July 20
jobs.ai_meta_description: National Board of Examinations (NBE) has released recruitment for 53 Group A, B, C posts. Apply online by 20th July 2026. Check eligibility, fees & important dates.
jobs.ai_overview: National Board of Examinations (NBE) ne Group A, B, aur C ke liye sarkari naukri ka mauka nikala hai. Kucch 53 posts ke liye vacancies hain aur interested candidates 29 June 2026 se 20 July 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain. Yeh bharti alag-alag departments mein hogi, jisme Stenographer, Junior Assistant, Deputy Director (Medical), Junior Programmer, aur Junior Accountant jaise posts shamil hain. Application fees General category ke liye Rs. 1500 + GST hai, jabki SC/ST/Female/PwBD candidates ke liye koi fee nahi hai. Ummeedwaron ki umar 20 July 2026 tak post ke hisaab se alag-alag honi chahiye, jiska minimum 18 saal hai aur maximum 35 saal tak ja sakta hai (Deputy Director Medical post ke liye). Selection process ke baare mein zyaada jaankari official notification mein di gayi hai, jo ki NBE ki website par uplabdh hai. Yeh sarkari naukri ka ek accha avsar hai unke liye jo medical education aur examination ke kshetr mein apna career banana chahte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: NBE dwara jari ki gayi yeh bharti, medical education sector mein career banane ke liye ek mahatvapurna avsar pradan karti hai. Kul 53 posts ke liye ye bharti NBE ke alag-alag group A, B, aur C departments mein ki jayegi. Application ki process 29 June se shuru hokar 20 July 2026 ko samapt hogi. Fees structure mein General category ke liye Rs. 1500 plus 18% GST hai, jo ki thoda zyada lag sakta hai, par SC/ST/Female/PwBD categories ke liye koi application fee nahi hai. Ummeedwaron ko apni eligibility, khaas kar age limit (20 July 2026 tak counting) aur educational qualifications ke liye detail mein notification check karna chahiye. Ye bharti ek structured selection process ke through hogi jiske baare mein adhik jaankari notification mein uplabdh hai. Vyavasthit tyari ke saath, ummeedwar is mauke ka fayda utha sakte hain.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap 12th pass hain, graduation ki hai (B.Com, Maths, Statistics, ya Computer Science mein), ya Master's degree (Medical field mein) rakhte hain aur sarkari naukri ki talash mein hain, toh yeh bharti aapke liye hai. Khaas taur par, agar aap Stenographer (80 WPM English Shorthand ke saath), Junior Assistant, Deputy Director (Medical), Junior Programmer, ya Junior Accountant jaisi positions ke liye qualify karte hain, toh aapko is avsar ko pakadna chahiye. Minimum age 18 saal aur maximum age post ke anusaar alag-alag hai, jiska calculation 20 July 2026 ko kiya jayega. Agar aap NBE jaise pratishthit sanstha mein career banana chahte hain, toh yeh ek accha mauka hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Is bharti ke liye taiyari karne ke liye, sabse pehle NBE ki official notification ko dhyan se padhein aur apni post ki eligibility criteria ko samajhein. Stenographer post ke liye shorthand aur typing skills ko behtar banayein. Junior Assistant, Programmer aur Accountant posts ke liye relevant subjects jaise Maths, Commerce, Computer Science ki basics ko strong karein. General aptitude aur reasoning skills ko behtar karne ke liye competitive exam books ka sahara lein. Mock tests dekar apni speed aur accuracy ko improve karein. Computer-based exam ke liye computer knowledge ko bhi revise karna faydemand hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: NBE dwara prakashit ki gayi vibhinn posts ke liye vetan (salary) ki jaankari official notification mein uplabdh hai. Har post ke liye vetan man (pay scale) alag-alag hoga, jo ki NBE ke niyam anusar hoga. Yahan post ke anusaar Group A, B, aur C ki salaries honi chahiye, jisme Junior Assistant aur Stenographer jaise posts ka pay scale alag hoga aur Deputy Director (Medical) jaise posts ka pay scale unke degree aur experience ke hisab se adhik hoga. Vistrit vetan details aur anya bhatta (allowances) ke liye, kripya NBE ki official notification ko dekhein.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Is bharti mein alag-alag roles ke liye avsar hain. Stenographer post mein document typing, shorthand notes lena aur administrative tasks mein sahayata karna shamil hoga. Junior Assistant administrative support, record maintenance aur basic office duties ke liye honge. Deputy Director (Medical) post mein medical education aur examination se jude strategic planning aur administrative responsibilities hongi. Junior Programmer IT support, software development aur maintenance mein sahayata karega. Junior Accountant accounts management, financial record keeping aur audit support mein madad karega. Har post ki apni visheshtaayein aur zimmedariyan hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Chayan prakriya (selection process) mein NBE dwara nirbhar karti hai, lekin aam taur par ismein likhit pariksha (written examination) ya computer-based test (CBT) shamil ho sakta hai. Kuch posts ke liye, jaise Stenographer, skill test bhi liya ja sakta hai. Deputy Director (Medical) jaise posts ke liye interview bhi ho sakta hai. Aapko vyavsayik pariksha (trade test) aur/ya interview ke liye bhi tayyar rehna chahiye. Eligibility criteria ko poora karna aur competitive exam mein achha performance karna chayan ke liye zaroori hai. Apne chosen post ke syllabus ko samajhna aur uske hisaab se planning karna ek acchi strategy hogi.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: NBE mein Group A, B, aur C ke vibhinn posts par sarkari naukri paane ke liye, sabse pehle NBE ki official website, ya diye gaye download notification link par jaakar poori jaankari prapt karein. Yadi aap yogyata poori karte hain, toh 'Apply Online' link par click karein. Ek naya registration karna hoga, jiske baad aapko application form mein apni sabhi details, jaise naam, pita ka naam, pata, educational qualifications, aur anya zaroori jaankari sahi-sahi bharni hogi. Form submit karne se pehle, sabhi details ko dhyan se check kar lein. Application submit karne ke baad, NBE dwara nirdharit shulk (fee) ka bhugtan Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, ya UPI ke madhyam se online karna hoga. SC/ST/Female/PwBD candidates ke liye koi shulk nahi hai. Application form submit karne ke baad uska printout future use ke liye zaroor save kar lein.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Pariksha 05-06 September 2026 ko aayojit ki jayegi. Admit card pariksha se pehle jari kar diye jayenge.

jobs.ai_title: CGPSC ADPO Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 15 Posts
jobs.ai_meta_description: CGPSC is recruiting for 15 Assistant District Prosecution Officer (ADPO) posts. The last date to apply online is 21/06/2026. Check details and apply now!
jobs.ai_overview: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) ne Assistant District Prosecution Officer (ADPO) ke liye naukri ka mauka nikala hai. Kul 15 posts hain jinke liye eligible candidates apply kar sakte hain. Ye sarkari naukri ka ek achha avsar hai unke liye jo law background se hain aur public service mein apna career banana chahte hain. Application process 22 June 2026 se shuru ho gaya hai aur 21 June 2026 tak online apply karne ki last date hai. Iske liye Bachelor Degree in Law hona zaroori hai. Age limit 21 se 30 saal ke beech honi chahiye, jo 01/01/2026 ko consider ki jayegi. Selection process mein exam aur interview ho sakta hai, jiska tentative exam date 20 September 2026 hai. Aage ki jaankari ke liye official notification avashya dekhein.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: CGPSC dwara ADPO ke 15 posts ke liye yeh notification sarkari naukri ki taiyari kar rahe candidates ke liye ek mahatvapurn avsar hai. Law graduates ke liye yeh ek direct recruitment hai, jo unhe judicial system mein entry karne ka seedha rasta pradan karti hai. Competition kafi acha hone ki ummeed hai, isliye candidates ko puri mehnat se taiyari karni chahiye. Exam date tentative hai, isliye applicants ko timeline ke hisab se apni preparation ko manage karna hoga. Application fee bhi category ke hisab se alag hai, jise online mode se pay karna hoga. Is vacancy ke baare mein sabhi detailed jankari official notification mein uplabdh hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aapne kisi recognized university se Bachelor Degree in Law (LLB) complete ki hai aur aapki umar 01/01/2026 tak 21 se 30 saal ke beech hai, to yeh naukri aapke liye hai. Yeh un candidates ke liye khaas taur par faydemand hai jo Chhattisgarh mein sarkari naukri karna chahte hain aur public prosecution mein career banane ki ichha rakhte hain. Agar aap eligible hain aur law ke field mein apna future secure karna chahte hain, to is avsar ka laabh uthana chahiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: ADPO exam ki taiyari ke liye, sabse pehle syllabus ko acche se samajhein. Law ke core subjects par focus karein, jaise ki Indian Penal Code, Criminal Procedure Code, Indian Evidence Act, aur Constitution of India. Previous year papers ko solve karne se exam pattern aur important topics ka pata chalega. Regular revision aur mock tests dena bahut zaroori hai. Current affairs se updated rahein, khaaskar judiciary aur law se jude mamlon mein. Time management skills ko develop karne ke liye practice karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Assistant District Prosecution Officer (ADPO) ke liye salary details sarkari notification mein uplabdh hain. CGPSC ke tahat aane wale padon ke liye salary ka structure Gujarat ki government norms ke anusar hota hai, jo kafi aakarshak hota hai. Iske alawa, government rules ke mutabik vibhinn bhatte aur suvidhayein bhi mil sakti hain. Vistarit jankari ke liye, kripya adhikarik suchna dekhein.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Assistant District Prosecution Officer (ADPO) ka mukhya kaam rajya sarkaar ki taraf se adalat mein mukadmon ko pesh karna hota hai. Is bhumika mein, ADPO ko apradhik mamlon mein sarkaar ka pratinidhitva karna hota hai, saboot pesh karne aur gawahon se pooch-tachh karne mein sahayata karna hota hai. Yeh ek zimmedari wala pad hai jisme kanooni gyan aur tarkik kshamta dono ki avashyakta hoti hai. Is post ke dwara, aap nyayik pranali mein mahatvapurn yogdan dete hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: CGPSC ADPO ke liye chunav prakriya mein likhit pariksha aur interview shamil ho sakta hai. Likht pariksha mein kanooni gyan aur aam gyan jaise vishay shamil honge. Is pariksha mein achhe ankh laane ke liye, kanooni nibandhon ki mazbooti aur samanya jankari ka virodhaavashyak hai. Interview mein aapke communication skills, analytical abilities aur pad ke liye fitness ka mulyankan kiya jayega. Dono hi charanon mein safalta paane ke liye ek suchit aur vyavasthit taiyari avashyak hai.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: CGPSC ADPO recruitment 2026 ke liye online apply karne ke liye, sabse pehle CGPSC ki official website par jayen. Wahan aapko 'Apply Online' link milega, jise click karne par application form khulega. Form mein maangi gayi sabhi jankari, jaise ki personal details, educational qualifications, aur contact information, sahi-sahi bharein. Zaroori documents jaise ki passport size photo, signature, aur caste certificate scan karke upload karein. Application fee ka bhugtan online mode mein Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / Online ke dwara karein. Sabhi jankari verify karne ke baad form submit kar dein aur confirmation page ka printout zaroor lein.

ai_schema_faq.question: Exam ki tentative date kya hai?
ai_schema_faq.answer: Pariksha ki tentative date 20 September 2026 hai.

ai_schema_faq.question: Kya koi anya rajya ka nagrik bhi apply kar sakta hai?
ai_schema_faq.answer: Haan, anya rajyon ke nagrik bhi apply kar sakte hain, lekin unhe General category ke liye nirdharit sharton aur fee (400 rupaye) ka palan karna hoga.

ai_schema_faq.question: ADPO post ke liye admit card kab milega?
ai_schema_faq.answer: Admit card pariksha se pehle uplabdh karaya jayega. Iske baare mein update ke liye official website check karte rahein.

ai_schema_faq.question: Kya yeh post Chhattisgarh state ke liye hai?
ai_schema_faq.answer: Haan, yeh CGPSC dwara bharti hai, jo Chhattisgarh rajya se sambandhit hai.
